title: Iran-Linked Ships Slow or Stop as U.S. Navy Enforces Strait of Hormuz Blockade
summary_full: More than a dozen U.S. Navy warships are enforcing a blockade on all vessels from all nations entering or leaving coastal areas or ports in Iran.
summary_public: More than a dozen U.S. Navy warships are enforcing a blockade on all vessels from all nations entering or leaving coastal areas or ports in Iran.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. Navy Enforces Strait of Hormuz Blockade
